inputs.text:
This video is a static text-and-image template with a soft blue-purple gradient background, creating a calm, deep and philosophical atmosphere. The title "How to Become a Millionaire" is prominently displayed at the top in bold white typography, with a simple horizontal line beneath it as a visual divider.

In the middle is a translucent light-colored dialog box containing the quote: "It is the small daily accumulations and choices that truly shape your future." The text is concise and powerful, emphasizing long-term thinking and the importance of small decisions; quotation marks on both sides reinforce the authority of the message.

At the bottom, two information blocks are arranged left and right: the left is labeled "@Pixelle.AI" with the subtitle "Open Source Omnimodal AI Creative Agent," indicating the content is generated by an open-source AI creative agent; the right shows "Pixelle-Video Text Only Template," marking this as a text-only style video template. The layout is symmetric and balanced, modern and professional in design.

A few green leaves decorate the edges of the frame, providing a natural, breathing accent against the blue background and adding a touch of life and human warmth. There are no dynamic effects or characters on the screen; the message about wealth growth is conveyed purely through color, composition and copy—the idea that true success comes from daily details and wise choices accumulated over time. Suitable for personal-development short videos, financial education or motivational sharing, with both aesthetic quality and practical value.
